creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This port does not compile: 
tmp-add_n.s: Assembler messages: 
tmp-add_n.s:94: Error: Alignment not a power of 2 
tmp-add_n.s:129: Error: Alignment not a power of 2 
*** Error code 1 

(for nessus-libraries, that is). 

However, since version 1.0.3 is out and 1.0.0 is kinda obsolete (it 
even does not exist any more on the author's site), I suggest you 
update to 1.0.3 and submit a new PR. 

Thanks in advance!
